channel.title: flove making-of — curators questions
channel.description: New curators design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should nety curators be selected and held accountable?
item.description:
• Elected by peers — Curators elected by community members. Democratic but slow. • Self-selected + community veto — Anyone can apply, community can veto. Fast but risky. • Tiered appointment — Higher-tier users appoint curators. Efficient but centralized. • Defer — Don't design yet — keep it abstract.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
